mapper.sql: id, fund_code, rank_no, stock_name, stock_code, market, holding_ratio, quarter_change_type, quarter_change_value, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fund_top_holding ( fund_code, rank_no, stock_name, stock_code, market, holding_ratio, quarter_change_type, quarter_change_value ) VALUES ( #{fundCode}, #{rankNo}, #{stockName}, #{stockCode}, #{market}, #{holdingRatio}, #{quarterChangeType}, #{quarterChangeValue} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE stock_name = VALUES(stock_name), stock_code = VALUES(stock_code), market = VALUES(market), holding_ratio = VALUES(holding_ratio), quarter_change_type = VALUES(quarter_change_type), quarter_change_value = VALUES(quarter_change_value), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT FROM fund_top_holding WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} ORDER BY id DESC
